title: /.well-known/host-meta.json
summary: Well-known URI suffix "/.well-known/host-meta.json". IANA status: permanent. Defined in RFC6415.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Wed, 13 May 2026 18:41:21 GMT

raw_columns.Related Information:
The "host-meta.json" documents obtained from the same host using the HTTP and 
HTTPS protocols (using default ports) MUST be identical.
